reasoning: The limiter is the 9.3% power drop from your 5-min to 20-min effort, indicating poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. Your last ride focused on a steady effort, so it's time to challenge your system with variable efforts to mimic the demands of the Alpine Loop climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x [12 min: 2 min at 218W, 2 min at 248W, repeat]; 3 min easy spin recovery between sets

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
